title: Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You've poured your heart and soul into creating digital products – ebooks, courses, and art – but PayPal and Stripe won't let you sell to your customers in Nigeria. They restrict transactions from your country, leaving you with no way to get paid. This is a common problem faced by creators in many countries, and it's time to find a solution that works for you, not against you. You need a reliable payment gateway that doesn't require a PayPal or Stripe account. The good news is that there are alternatives available, and we're going to break them down for you in this article. No more restrictions, no more hassle – it's time to get paid for your hard work.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Payhip, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, but they come with their own set of limitations. They require a PayPal or Stripe account, which can be a problem for creators in restricted countries. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a crypto-native payment gateway that allows creators to sell their products without any restrictions. It integrates with the Full Stack Bundle, a comprehensive solution for digital creators that includes a backend engine, wallet integration, and admin dashboard. With NOWPayments, you can sell your products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about payment processing issues.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Paypal and Stripe restrict transactions from certain countries, including Nigeria, due to anti-money laundering and know-your-customer regulations. This means that creators in these countries can't use their services to sell digital products. NOWPayments, on the other hand, is a blockchain-based payment gateway that doesn't require any KYC or AML checks. This means that creators can use it to sell their products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about payment processing issues.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed and fees are critical factors to consider when choosing a payment gateway. Payhip and Gumroad charge high fees for transactions, and payment processing times can be slow. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers fast payment processing times and competitive fees. With NOWPayments, you can get paid in a matter of minutes, not days or weeks. This means that you can focus on creating more content and engaging with your audience, rather than worrying about payment processing issues.
Don't let PayPal and Stripe restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products – NOWPayments is the solution you need.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are essential for digital creators who want to sell their products efficiently. Payhip and Gumroad require manual processing of transactions, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. NOWPayments, on the other hand, offers automated delivery of digital products, making it easy to sell and deliver your products to customers. With the Full Stack Bundle, you can automate the entire sales process, from payment processing to delivery, making it easy to scale your business.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

When choosing a payment gateway, consider your specific needs and situation. If you're a creator who wants to sell digital products to customers in restricted countries, NOWPayments is the clear choice. Its crypto-native infrastructure and automated delivery capabilities make it the perfect solution for creators who want to get paid for their hard work. With the Full Stack Bundle, you can create a comprehensive sales funnel that automates the entire payment processing and delivery process, making it easy to scale your business.
